requirements.text: The system shall provide an input field labeled 'Search for events, artists, venues...' on the homepage.
The system shall provide a 'Search' button on the homepage.
The system shall display the entered search term 'Wicked' in the 'Search for events, artists, venues...' input field.
Upon initiating a search, the system shall navigate to a dedicated search results page titled 'WICKED TICKETS'.
The system shall display a list of upcoming events matching the search query, including the date, event name, venue, and a 'Tickets' button for each event.
The system shall provide filter tabs for 'TIMES', 'DAYS', 'VENUES', 'CATEGORIES', and 'MONTHS' on the search results page.
The system shall visually indicate the currently selected filter tab, such as 'MONTHS'.
The system shall provide a dropdown menu next to the 'MONTHS' filter tab for selecting date ranges.

When the date range dropdown is activated, the system shall display options including 'Next 3 days', 'Next 7 days', 'Next 14 days', 'Next 30 days', 'Next 60 days', 'Next 90 days', 'Next 120 days', 'Next 180 days', 'Next 365 days', 'This Month', 'Next Month', and 'Select Date Range'.
The system shall display the currently applied location filter, such as 'Columbus, OH', on the search results page.
The system shall provide pagination controls (e.g., page numbers 1, 2, 3, 4, Next) for navigating through the event listings.
